Unbounded-low exclusive-high predicate at a transform boundary prunes ALL files under CALENDAR encoding (silent data loss)

typedCompare uses wrong column type names — numeric min/max accumulation always falls back to lexicographic comparison
listTableColumns reads columns at current snapshot, ignoring session/time-travel snapshot
On the DuckDB path, row-id injection and delete filtering assume unfiltered scan order but predicates are pushed to DuckDB

Locale-sensitive toLowerCase on view dialect
